message:
fix(core,cli,ondisk): remove unnecessary mut bindings and add safe u32 cast for btrfs superblock size

Three minor correctness/lint fixes:

1. ffs-core: remove unnecessary mut from block_dev in btrfs_write_data_blocks
2. ffs-cli: replace bare 'as u32' cast of BTRFS_SUPER_INFO_SIZE with
   u32::try_from() + descriptive error
3. ffs-ondisk: remove unnecessary mut from gd in block_bitmap_checksum test

Also updates beads issue tracker with compaction/rewrite of task entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
